summary: Computer Science Engineering student and full-stack developer with experience building AI-integrated web applications, blockchain systems, and backend automation tools. Strong focus on modern web architecture (Next.js, Node.js) and Data Structures & Algorithms.

experience.title: Founder & Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Engineered 'SaasRepurpose Cold Email Tool', a custom full-stack automation system using Node.js and Zoho SMTP.
Automated cold outreach campaigns by parsing CSV lead lists and dynamically injecting client data into targeted email workflows.
Managed end-to-end client strategy and content delivery for B2B SaaS founders, scaling the agency's operational efficiency.

projects.name: TrustRent
projects.description: Property management platform for landlords and tenants.
bullets: Developed a secure property management ecosystem utilizing Blockchain and Smart Contracts to enforce tenant agreements.
Integrated AI audits to automatically verify documents and streamline the onboarding process for landlords.
Built a high-performance, server-side rendered frontend interface using Next.js.

projects.name: VoiceBridge
projects.description: AI-driven speech therapy application designed for stroke survivors.
bullets: Engineered a full-stack application for the Microsoft Imagine Cup to assist stroke survivors with speech rehabilitation.
Integrated backend AI models to analyze user speech patterns and provide real-time therapeutic feedback.
Built responsive client-side UI components with React connected to a Node.js API layer.

projects.name: GhostHand
projects.description: AI-based screen control and automation through hand gestures.
bullets: Conceptualized and built a Python-based computer vision application for desktop automation.
Implemented gesture recognition algorithms using device cameras to map specific hand movements to system voice actions and screen controls.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

achievements: Microsoft Imagine Cup Participant — Developed VoiceBridge AI application
Active DSA problem solver — Focused on algorithmic patterns including Two Pointers, Sliding Window, and Kadane's Algorithm
